description: This file contains the main React frontend component for the task organizer application. It includes UI components, state management, and logic for authentication, task management, filtering, and rendering the task interface with retro styling.

classes.name: RetroShell
classes.description: A layout container providing common styling for the app's pages.

classes.name: Banner
classes.description: Header component displaying the app title and environment info.

classes.name: RetroButton
classes.description: A styled button component with variants for primary, ghost, and danger styles.

classes.name: Field
classes.description: A label and container for form inputs, with optional hints.

classes.name: RetroInput
classes.description: Styled input element used for text, email, and date inputs.

classes.name: RetroTextArea
classes.description: Styled textarea input for multi-line text.

classes.name: Toast
classes.description: Notification component for displaying status messages.

classes.name: TaskCard
classes.description: Component representing a single task item with options to edit or delete.

classes.name: TaskModal
classes.description: Modal dialog for creating or editing tasks.

classes.name: AuthCard
classes.description: Component for user login and registration interface.

methods.name: formatStatusLabel
methods.description: Returns user-friendly label for a given task status.

methods.name: formatPriorityLabel
methods.description: Returns user-friendly label for a given task priority.

methods.name: todayISODate
methods.description: Returns current date in ISO format (YYYY-MM-DD).

methods.name: groupByStatus
methods.description: Groups an array of tasks into statuses.

methods.name: sortTasksForColumn
methods.description: Sorts tasks by priority and due date.

methods.name: Home
methods.description: Main React component managing the entire task organizer app, handling authentication, task list, filters, modals, and rendering task lanes.
